commit.subject: LU-8130 libcfs: improve hash handling
commit.message:
LU-8130 libcfs: improve hash handling

In newer kernels the hash handling code has issues with
collisions so it was reworked. Update lustre to make
use of these hash improvements. Also addressed are
several issues pointed out by George Spelvin on the
lkml on May 2 2016 [(Rant) Fix various hash abuses].

Change-Id: Ie2c4168484ae48656e6f54090b68fbba3c4232b9
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
